  var sum = 0_i64
  var current = n
  while current > 0
    sum += current % 10
    current /= 10
  end
  sum
end

  DP_prev = Array(5001) { 0_i64 }

  let d0 = digitSum[0]
  if Candidates[d0].size == 0

  for v in Candidates[d0]

  end
  
  # Step 3: Iteration (i = 1 to N-1)

    DP_curr = Array(5001) { 0_i64 }
    
    # Calculate Prefix Sums of DP_prev
    # PrefixSum[v] = Sum(DP_prev[u] for u=0 to v)
    prefixSum = 0_i64

    end
    
    DP_prev = DP_curr
  end
  
  # Step 4: Result

    totalCount = (totalCount + count) % MOD
  end
  
  totalCount
end
